Advanced Ads Training
Connectio offers several different products, I personally bought the suite and found
usage in 3/4 of the tools provided which gave me more value for the money I was
spending to buy the 'suite' rather than the individual product. All of these are equally
powerful if you use them and actually know what the f*** you're doing!
Connectio Suite Sign Up
They also have this dope ROI calculator I've used in my agency for my own ads to
calculate profits and visualize ad spends to return ratios: ROI Calculator.
